span.p:
InventoryReservation: CONFIRMED
stock deducted
publishes InventoryDeducted

span.p:
confirm() — Phase 2
Toss API POST /v1/payments/confirm
10s timeout · Circuit Breaker

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Payment: APPROVED
paymentKey + method set
publishes PaymentCompleted

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Payment: FAILED
failureCode + message set
publishes PaymentFailed
